The Morpho Bundler lets you bundle multiple actions into one transaction.
 
For example: use wstETH collateral to borrow USDC, and then supply USDC into a vault.
wstETH
Supply wstETH as collateral
Market A
USDC
Borrow USDC
Market A
USDC
Supply USDC
Vault A
